farmerFacingTitle: Product label needed for Field 17 operation
conciseReason: The planned operation is missing product identity evidence.
actionText: Upload a readable photo of the product label before promoting this operation.

burdenEstimate.estimatedEffort: under 2 minutes if product container is available

dueText: Before the planned operation is accepted for compliance-grade use.
consequenceText: Without it, OFARM must keep the operation blocked or qualified for compliance use.
